TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Chunri Itini i Pingtung ko Chunri Siyang . sa'osi han ko po:long no palaan i, ira ko 155.55 km² (lalotolotokan a plalan no sa'osi i ira ko 67.65 km², o palaan noto'as i'a:yaw i ira ko 84.62 km²), 4,802 ko tamdaw i Chunri Siyang, 1,357 ko parod no loma', itini i niyaro' a Yincomin sa'osi han ira ko 4,590 a tamdaw, pakaala to 96%(Paiwan) no polong no tamdaw. o Paiwan ko sa'alomanay i Pingtung. O kasaniyarona 6 ko cun, 6 ko niyaro' i Chunri Siyang. Lalekeleke , Kasuga , Seveng , Tjuvecekadan , Kuabar , Kinayiman .
S.PHON: ʦħo~u~unri itini i piŋto~u~uŋ ko~u ʦħo~u~unri sijaŋ . saʡo~usi ħan ko~u po~u:ɾo~uŋ no~u paɾaan i, ira ko~u ***.** km* (ɾaɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan a pɾaɾan no~u saʡo~usi i ira ko~u **.** km*, o~u paɾaan no~uto~uʡas iʡa:jaw i ira ko~u **.** km*), *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw i ʦħo~u~unri sijaŋ, *,*** ko~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, itini i nijaro~uʡ a jinʦo~umin saʡo~usi ħan ira ko~u *,*** a tamɬ~ɮaw, pakaaɾa to~u **%(paiwan) no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u paiwan ko~u saʡaɾo~umanaj i piŋto~u~uŋ. o~u kasanijaro~una * ko~u ʦo~u~un, * ko~u nijaro~uʡ i ʦħo~u~unri sijaŋ. ɾaɾəkəɾəkə , kaso~u~u*a , səb~vəŋ , tjo~u~ub~vəʦəkaɬ~ɮan , ko~u~uab~b~var , kinajiman .
S.FORM: Chunri Itini i Pingtung ko Chunri Siyang . sa'osi han ko po:long no palaan i, ira ko 155.55 km² (lalotolotokan a plalan no sa'osi i ira ko 67.65 km², o palaan noto'as i'a:yaw i ira ko 84.62 km²), 4,802 ko tamdaw i Chunri Siyang, 1,357 ko parod no loma', itini i niyaro' a Yincomin sa'osi han ira ko 4,590 a tamdaw, pakaala to 96%(Paiwan) no polong no tamdaw. o Paiwan ko sa'alomanay i Pingtung. O kasaniyarona 6 ko cun, 6 ko niyaro' i Chunri Siyang. Lalekeleke , Kasuga , Seveng , Tjuvecekadan , Kuabar , Kinayiman .
S.PHON: ʦħo~u~unri itini i piŋto~u~uŋ ko~u ʦħo~u~unri sijaŋ . saʡo~usi ħan ko~u po~u:ɾo~uŋ no~u paɾaan i, ira ko~u ***.** km* (ɾaɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan a pɾaɾan no~u saʡo~usi i ira ko~u **.** km*, o~u paɾaan no~uto~uʡas iʡa:jaw i ira ko~u **.** km*), *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw i ʦħo~u~unri sijaŋ, *,*** ko~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, itini i nijaro~uʡ a jinʦo~umin saʡo~usi ħan ira ko~u *,*** a tamɬ~ɮaw, pakaaɾa to~u **%(paiwan) no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u paiwan ko~u saʡaɾo~umanaj i piŋto~u~uŋ. o~u kasanijaro~una * ko~u ʦo~u~un, * ko~u nijaro~uʡ i ʦħo~u~unri sijaŋ. ɾaɾəkəɾəkə , kaso~u~u*a , səb~vəŋ , tjo~u~ub~vəʦəkaɬ~ɮan , ko~u~uab~b~var , kinajiman .
